name: The Song of Seven : Overture
short_description: Kiba, an anxious musician is convinced by a reckless inventor Emma, into leaving his village to discover the world outside...and himself.
detailed_description:
Become a part of Kiba's inner growth as faces his fears and discovers mysteries of the forgotten gods.

The Song of Seven is a narrative focused / puzzle fantasy adventure! 

Our (mostly) cozy adventure begins within the isolated walls of Kami village. A remote tribe that has cast itself out from the world.  Kiba, the future of the tribe, after tending to his duty's, meets Emma, a young girl from the outside. Despite his fears - he is convinced to experience the world from lush forests to hidden temples.

Director's Cut Patch

In September 2025 - a major update will be published! 

  • Controller Support

  • Rebalanced Puzzles

  • Rebuilt Lighting

  • Story / Narrative additions and adjustments

  • In-game guide

Game Features

  • Inventory based and Interactive puzzles

  • 10+ beautiful / unique / fantasy environments

  • Enriching character development

  • Whimsical fantasy world 

  • In depth conversations with a colorful cast of characters

  • Uncover mysteries

  • Press to continue dialog

Accessibility 

  • Adjustable Audio

  • In-game guide inside the menus if you are stuck or just want to 
    experience the narrative

  • Controller / Keyboard / Mouse support

  • Note : There is one (short) timed puzzle and audio puzzle. (refer to the in game guide if you are hearing impaired.)

Developer's Note

  • This game was originally part 1 of a 3 part series. While this arc of the narrative is complete, it does end on a cliffhanger. If at any point this game receives enough attention, we will be open to completing the full story!
